channel.title: vsc on My Hugo
channel.description: Recent content in vsc on My Hugo

item.title: Useful Visual Studio Code Extensions
item.description: Class Extension Author Description Debug C/C++ Microsoft language support including IntelliSense and debugging Generic Remote Debugger Marcel J. Kloubert makes it easy to debug code on a remote host by using a generic way. Native Debug WebFreek supports both gdb and lldb. GDB Debug DamianKoper Bash Debug rogalmic A bash debugger GUI frontend based on awesome bashdb scripts (bashdb now included in package).

item.title: VisualStudio Code and Javascript
item.description: Project Configuration SC-P open action menu, type javascript and choose “Go to project configuration” Create/Edit jsconfig.json at the workspace root ${workspaceFolder}/jsconfig.json by defaut it looks like { "compilerOptions": { "module": "commonjs", "target": "es2016", "jsx": "preserve" }, "exclude": [ "node_modules", "**/node_modules/*" ] } Debugging Click Debug icon in #Activity Bar# to activate the Debug view Click gear icon at the top of the Debug view to create/modify launch.

item.title: Keyboard Shortcuts
item.description: Eclipse Edit strokes purpose Debug F5 step in F6 step over F7 step out ^R run to line S-^B toggle breakpoint F8 continue F11 debug Edit ^_ toggle split editor horizontal ^{ toggle split editor vertical ^/ toggle comment VSC Edit shortcut ation ^]/[ indent/outdent S^ jump to matching bracket ^K ^C/U add/remove line comment ^/ toggle line comment Navigate shortcut ation ^T show all symbols ^G go to line… ^P go to file… S^O go to symbol… ^K ^J/K/L bookmark prev/toggle/next A^–/+ go back/forward F12 go to definition A-F12 peek definition S-F12 show references F2 rename symbol ^TAB open next Layout shortcut ation ^ split editor SA-1 toggle editor layout (v/h) S^V toggle markdown preview ^` show integrated terminal ^P quick open S^P show command palette S^N new window Debug shortcut ation F9 toggle breakpoint F5 start/continue S-F5 stop F11/S-F11 step in/out F10 step over
